title: Rainbow Slime Blocks
description:
I created this recource pack in mind and to use simultaneously with RyanTheScion Rainbow_Slimes resource pack.

You can just use this one with the regular Slime mob (RyanTheScion Rainbow_Slimes not needed for this resource pack to work).
body:
**Colored Slime Blocks – Now in 13 Different Colors!**

I created this resource pack to be used alongside RyanTheScion’s Rainbow_Slimes, but it also works perfectly on its own! This pack changes the Slime Block to come in 13 different colors, including the original green.

**Features:**
- Changes the Slime Block to have 13 different color variations.
- Works independently—you don’t need RyanTheScion’s pack to use it.
- Compatible with all Minecraft versions (1.8+).
  
**How It Affects Gameplay:**
  
This is a purely visual change that makes Slime Blocks more colorful and versatile, perfect for builders who want more variety in their creations. It doesn’t change mechanics, just the appearance!

Enjoy! 😊
